title: Pray for guidance for the Huynh family
description: Please pray God reveals his will for our family in serving the Church.
author: Lam Huynh

title: Comfort for the Smith Family
description: Please pray for the Smith family as they navigate the passing of their grandfather. Pray for peace and comfort during the memorial service this Friday.
author: Pastor John

title: Job Interview Wisdom
description: I have a final round interview on Wednesday morning for a new management role. Praying for clarity of mind, confidence, and that God's will be done.
author: Anonymous
